class Box
  def _init(v) self.v = v end
  def +(other) return Box(self.v + other.v) end
  def _str return 'Box(${self.v})' end
end
print(Box(0) + Box(5))

for i in 0..4 do
  if i % 2 == 0 then
    total += i * i
  else
    total -= i
  end
end
print(total)

  end
end

files.module_types_hash.pk:
import types
print(types.hashable(123))
print(types.hashable('abc'))
print(types.hashable([1, 2]))
print(types.hash('abc'))

files.module_bytebuffer_basic.pk:
import types
b = types.ByteBuffer()
print(b.write(65))
print(b.write(66))
print(b.write('CD'))
print(b.count())
print(b.string())
print(b[1])
b[1] = 90
print(b.string())
b.clear()
print(b.count())

files.module_bytebuffer_fill.pk:
import types
b = types.ByteBuffer()
b.reserve(8)
b.fill(3, 88)
print(b.count())
print(b[0])
print(b[2])

files.module_vector_accessors.pk:
from types import Vector
v = Vector(1, 2, 3)
print(v)
print(v.x + v.y + v.z)
v.y = 10
v.z = v.x + v.y
print(v)

files.module_os_files.pk:
import os
print(os.NAME)
print(os.getenv('PB_TEST_ENV'))
print(os.getenv('PB_MISSING_ENV'))
print(os.filesize('data.txt'))
os.mkdir('tmpdir')
os.chdir('tmpdir')
print(os.getcwd())
os.chdir('..')
os.rmdir('tmpdir')
print(os.exepath())

files.module_os_unlink_moditime.pk:
import os
print(os.filesize('payload.bin'))
print(os.moditime('payload.bin') > 0)
os.unlink('payload.bin')
print(os.moditime('payload.bin'))

files.module_time_sleep.pk:
from time import sleep
sleep(0)
print('sleep-ok')
